description: Deterministic acceptance rubric for an mcp-engineering deliverable. Each criterion is binary; a deliverable certifies only when every required criterion is satisfied.

criteria.label: Scope correctly resolved
criteria.check: Deliverable states team -> .mcp.json or personal -> ~/.claude.json with rationale.

criteria.label: Zero literal secrets in versioned files
criteria.check: All credentials referenced as ${ENV_VAR}; no sk-, ghp_, or long base64 literals.

criteria.label: Typed error contract complete
criteria.check: Every error exposes isError, errorCategory, isRetryable, and retryAfterSeconds when applicable.

criteria.label: Error-to-retryability mapping correct
criteria.check: auth=false, rate_limit=true, transient=true, fatal=false; client may harden, not relax.

criteria.label: Retry policy client-owned and bounded
criteria.check: Retry loop lives in client code with a maxRetries ceiling; not in the model prompt.

criteria.label: Leak remediation rotates and purges
criteria.check: If a secret leaked: rotate credential AND git filter-repo; .gitignore/git rm alone rejected.

criteria.label: MCP justified over built-in
criteria.check: Confirms no built-in (Read/Grep/Bash) covers the capability before endorsing a server.

criteria.label: Deterministic evidence attached
criteria.check: scripts/check.sh accepts valid fixtures and rejects mutations when JSON evidence is required.
